what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links a design-assets channel item to an image asset via a typed target URI and timestamp.
observations: File body is empty; no code symbols present
standards: Target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing into design-assets/icons
Timestamp is precise to microseconds with timezone
conventions: Target URI encodes channel and asset path
concerns: Target filename 'image (41)' looks auto-generated and non-descriptive
No alt text, dimensions, format, or author metadata
No link to the originating message or asset context
notes: A sparse attachment ledger entry that points a design-assets channel item to a generic icon image file.
questions: Which specific message or asset in the design-assets channel does this attachment belong to?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image attachment, and the file does exactly that with a typed target and timestamp.

contribution: A concrete attachment reference with a precise timestamp and typed target that a fused system can keep as evidence of a design-assets image shared at a specific time.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata file att-6a0612ad records an images-type attachment in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (41) with a 2026-06-22 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record a design-assets channel image attachment for later retrieval and asset tracking.
